overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting nighttime navigation from a vessel's bridge. The view shows the bow cutting through dark waters while navigation monitors display radar, GPS charts, and depth readings. The vessel adjusts speed and heading while traversing coastal waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles and forward windows

events.description: vessel speed reduces significantly from 10.7 knots to 5.4 knots
vessel accelerates back to cruising speed of 10.7 knots

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring radar and GPS displays while adjusting throttle through coastal waters

entered.detail: electronic chart display showing coastal map with vessel position
circular radar display with rotating sweep showing land mass to starboard
digital display showing depth sounding and vessel speed
forward deck of the ship with railings and navigation lights visible through the window
metal safety railing along the port side of the bow
metal safety railing along the starboard side of the bow
dark water surface with gentle waves illuminated by deck lights
dark horizon line separating sea from night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from a ship's bridge at night, with three navigation monitors visible above the forward windows. The vessel briefly slows down then resumes speed while navigating coastal waters, with the radar displaying land to the starboard side.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles and forward windows

events.description: distant vessel navigation light becomes visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady course and speed while monitoring the newly visible distant traffic contact on the radar display

notable_agents.action: distant vessel visible as a small white navigation light on the horizon, maintaining position relative to the ego vessel

entered.detail: small white navigation light from another vessel appearing on the dark horizon

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues steady navigation through dark coastal waters. A distant navigation light from another vessel appears on the horizon ahead, visible as a small white point in the center of the view. The radar continues to show the coastline to starboard while the bridge monitors display steady speed and heading.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates dark coastal waters toward a distant light on the horizon. It begins with a view of three navigation monitors positioned above the forward windows, where the vessel briefly slows before resuming its steady pace. As the ship maintains its heading, the radar continues to track the coastline to the starboard side while the monitors display stable speed readings. The scene then shifts focus toward the open sea ahead, where a small white navigation light from another vessel gradually emerges as a point of light in the center of the dark horizon.
